title: Romantic Yeasty Dutch Cheese Pastry
description: A paleo-friendly, yeasty Dutch dish featuring Castelvetrano olives, a mother sauce base, and a unique agave leaf vessel. Perfect for a romantic evening with a loved one.
instructions: Line a agave leaf vessel with parchment paper, leaving a 1-inch overhang on all sides.
In a large mixing bowl, combine almond flour, unsalted ghee, and Castelvetrano olives.
Add Gruyère cheese, active dry yeast, sea salt, and sugar to the mixing bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared agave leaf vessel and smooth the top with a spatula.
Bake the pastry for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Remove the pastry from the oven and let it cool in the vessel for 10 minutes.
Use the parchment paper to lift the pastry out of the vessel and transfer it to a wire rack to cool completely.
Let the pastry cool to room temperature before slicing and serving.
